{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032314560119DF6444F371FE3F1D1F"}"},"total":18864},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7382856575807865662","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看呀～主角人设很戳我，其它几位配角也很好，他们与主角之间的羁绊很感人，虽然都说宋晓夏的死亡很遗憾，但是她的死也是必然的，她在主角的生命中是一个很特别的人，也是推动剧情的关键人物，主角在青春朦胧的年纪遇见一个这样的一个温暖，温柔的人，也许这就是最好的。作者的群像写很好啊～主角团互相信任，互相帮助，在危险时刻不抛弃不放弃，这种感觉真的很温暖。作者大大要加油哦～[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718960444,"group_id":"7253908182769077252","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"冥冥之中一切自有注定","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4uWvOcPQ/VAdukXXz9fPe0/ib+2tFgd6KGclXCgk2dP","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/78ff9da95f7b47bda87a8879e6f7e3e7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788137&x-signature=JTgPI%2BfkxgmggAq14FzBq9RfM64%3D","user_id":"2177485170020951","user_name":"九九安"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2177485170020951","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7253908182769077252","book_info":{"abstract":"【诡异降临+无系统+设定新颖+逃生+半无限流+不圣母+不黑暗+异能】
最好的年纪，肆意盎然的青春，正当苏远认为一生都会这么平静而美好的度过时，一行血字出现在了晚自习的黑板上。
【在寂静的黑夜，寝室的门口出现了一只恐怖的厉鬼......它杀死你需要多久呢？】
在所有人都以为这只是一个玩笑时，午夜的寝室门外响起了脚步声......
一个接着一个的都市怪谈成为现实，一个又一个死去的人被抹去痕迹。
当灵异降临之时，死亡即是终点。
（前期慢热，好评如潮，请给耐心）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a0f7d7ab78dbfd9a2c6e79c0e8196644","author":"庆元职高小天才","author_id":"","book_id":"7253908182769077252","book_name":"灵异复苏，永夜降临","book_short_name":"临界黑夜","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"35万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7253908259512254991","read_count":"349225","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2051929"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"979","tags":"悬疑脑洞,无限流,灵异,悬疑,规则怪谈","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/72f707da01c57cde3e76b717286a0e2b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779432961&x-signature=XQRr8eZrH070aPUvRwlFwKK0tDg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3069482604710637","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"159"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032314560119DF6444F371FE3F1D1F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":73,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":23885,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":117882},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7365808726043411225","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者文笔很好，把在生死之间的人性和人心写得很有感觉，文风有种淡淡的黑色幽默感，有种很莫名其妙的笑点[笑哭][笑哭]
另外细节其实也很棒的！感觉和前几年火起来的绝望教室故事模版很像，设定又有点类似十日终焉，总之剧情很棒棒的！主角以及配角也非常鲜明立体，哪怕是炮灰也有几个塑造的挺饱满的。
希望作者坚持下去，很喜欢你的文笔[爱心][爱心]","text_exts":[{"e":101,"s":97,"text":"十日终焉","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8D%81%E6%97%A5%E7%BB%88%E7%84%89&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774248961FE3F1D1F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227365808726043411225%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227253908182769077252%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8D%81%E6%97%A5%E7%BB%88%E7%84%89%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714988241,"group_id":"7253908182769077252","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyJXTEGmfuoDX0G33624sK65c8IBjGyxBP79GDtj9TDy","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2585676375138716","user_name":"重明·"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2585676375138716","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7253908182769077252","book_info":{"abstract":"【诡异降临+无系统+设定新颖+逃生+半无限流+不圣母+不黑暗+异能】
